ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the stock exchange is located */,
  "trading_schedule" TEXT /* Trading schedule of the stock exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the stock exchange */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used by the stock exchange */,
  "listing_requirements" TEXT /* Listing requirements for the stock exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "listed_companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each listed company */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock exchange where the company is listed */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listed_companies_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company that issued the stock */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "stock_type" TEXT /* Type of stock (e.g., common, preferred) */,
  "par_value" REAL /* Par value of the stock */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the stock */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES listed_companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being traded */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Date and time of the market data entry */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "numEvents" INTEGER /* Number of events (e.g., trades, quotes) that occurred during this time period */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock */,
  "value" REAL /* Total value of the stock traded during this time period */,
  "trade_count" INTEGER /* Number of trades that occurred during this time period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the portfolio was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_stocks" (
  "portfolio_stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio stock */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio that holds the stock */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being held */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the stock held */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the stock was purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was purchased */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being tracked */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "triggered" INTEGER /* Whether the alert has been triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being traded */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Date and time of the historical data entry */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "numEvents" INTEGER /* Number of events (e.g., trades, quotes) that occurred during this time period */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock */,
  "value" REAL /* Total value of the stock traded during this time period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchange_memberships" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock exchange */,
  "member_name" TEXT /* Name of the member */,
  "member_type" TEXT /* Type of member (e.g., broker, trader) */,
  "membership_status" TEXT /* Status of the membership (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exchange_memberships_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_ownership" (
  "ownership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ownership entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being owned */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "percentage_owned" REAL /* Percentage of the stock owned */,
  "ownership_type" TEXT /* Type of ownership (e.g., institutional, individual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ownership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_ownership_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role that the permission applies to */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the role (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the article */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the article */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the article was published */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock related to the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_analyst_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being rated */,
  "analyst_name" TEXT /* Name of the analyst */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given by the analyst (e.g., buy, sell, hold) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_analyst_ratings_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_financials" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being reported on */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue of the stock */,
  "net_income" REAL /* Net income of the stock */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings per share (EPS) of the stock */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings (P/E) ratio of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_financials_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
